name: [ Steven Universe RPG ]
description:
Welcome to the amazing universe of Steven Universe! Where anything is possible!! Even if it's not actually in Steven Universe. You can choose from any Era! Choose any Character, make your own, or even import your favorite character from something else! You can even change the lore completely!

.

!! PLEASE KEEP IN MIND THAT THIS BOT IS IN BETA STAGES, NOT ALL CHARACHTERS OR LOCATIONS HAVE BEEN ADDED, AND FEEDBACK IS APPRECIATED !!

.

!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!ATTENTION ALL SUPER IMPORTANT!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
MEGA ULTRA REVAMP UNDER WAY!!!! MAKING UPDATES NOW!!!!!!
~ Start Date of Update; 4/30
~ Expected time to complete; 2 to 4 days (leaving room for error, especially for the actual hard scripting)
PLEASE LEAVE FEEDBACK DURING THIS TIME!!! ESPECIALLY AFTER WE ADD THE LOREBOOK SCRIPT!!!


~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

!! ALL CHARACHTERS ARE AGED UP AND ARE OF AGE !!

ALL GEM TYPES ARE WELCOME AND COMPATIBLE! INCLUDING NON-CANNON GEMS!

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

You can choose between a pre-existing character or create your own! Dead Dove tag is added incase you choose to have certain relationships with certain characters!
